sll $0,$0,0
#initialize
addi $0,$0,0x0000
addi $1,$0,0x0005
addi $2,$0,0xFFFF

# bgtz test: $1 = 5 > 0, should branch
bgtz $1,TARGET1
addi $3,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET1:
addi $4,$0,0x0001

# Test bgtz with negative value (should not branch)
addi $5,$0,0xFFFB
bgtz $5,TARGET2
addi $6,$0,0x0001
j TARGET3
TARGET2:
addi $6,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET3:

# Test bgtz with zero (should not branch)
addi $7,$0,0x0000
bgtz $7,TARGET4
addi $8,$0,0x0001
j TARGET5
TARGET4:
addi $8,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET5:

# Test bgtz with larger positive value
addi $9,$0,0x000A
bgtz $9,TARGET6
addi $10,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET6:
addi $11,$0,0x0001

halt
